items.title: Monolithic handlers.go (1,216 lines) in orchestrator API layer
items.evidence: services/orchestrator-go/internal/api/handlers.go is 1,216 lines combining all HTTP handlers. Violates SRP, makes code review and testing harder.
items.acceptance_criteria: Split handlers.go into domain-grouped files (runs_handlers.go, agents_handlers.go, flows_handlers.go, schedule_handlers.go, webhook_handlers.go). Each file <300 lines. All existing tests pass.

items.title: Zero test coverage for auth, driver, dataflow, config packages
items.evidence: auth/ (3 files, 0 tests), driver/ (4 files, 0 tests), dataflow/ (2 files, 0 tests), config/ (1 file, 0 tests). These are critical security and execution paths.
items.acceptance_criteria: Add unit tests for: API key store CRUD + validation, OIDC middleware, subprocess driver exec/cancel, K8s driver job creation/status, S3 dataflow upload/download, config loading from env. Coverage >60% per package.

items.title: Silent Redis-to-memory fallback loses data on restart
items.evidence: cmd/orchestrator/main.go:85-86 — Redis connection failure silently degrades to in-memory store. Operator may not notice runs/state lost on pod restart.
items.acceptance_criteria: When ORCH_RUNSTORE=redis, fail startup if Redis unreachable (exit 1). Add --allow-memory-fallback flag for dev. Emit critical-level log + metric on fallback.

items.title: 457 'any' type usages in frontend codebase
items.evidence: 457 occurrences of 'any' type across frontend src/. Key areas: api-integration.ts (5 functions), streaming.ts event payloads, stores/layout/index.ts action creators, graph.ts enum typing.
items.acceptance_criteria: Reduce 'any' count below 50. Add discriminated union types for SSE events. Type API response types. Enable strict noImplicitAny in tsconfig.

items.title: Frontend test coverage at ~20% (38/186 files tested)
items.evidence: 38 test files for 186 source files. Untested: canvas components, layout management, overlay system, service integrations, most hooks.
items.acceptance_criteria: Reach 60% statement coverage. Priority test targets: MissionControlLayout, NetworkPanel, ConsolePanel, API service layer, streaming store.

items.title: K8s manifests use :latest tags in production
items.evidence: k8s/kustomization.yaml:21-31 sets newTag: latest for all 4 images. imagePullPolicy: Always mitigates but introduces drift risk if Flux applies without CI override.
items.acceptance_criteria: CI pins image tags to git SHA or semver. Kustomization.yaml uses placeholder tags overridden by CI. imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent for tagged images.

items.title: Hardcoded IP in frontend K8s manifest
items.evidence: k8s/frontend.yaml:54 — VITE_GATEWAY_BASE_URL set to http://192.168.50.244:8080. Breaks portability across environments.
items.acceptance_criteria: Replace hardcoded IP with service DNS or ingress-derived URL. Use ConfigMap or kustomize overlay per environment.

items.title: Monolithic scheduler.go (1,028 lines) mixes DAG execution, retry, gate logic
items.evidence: services/orchestrator-go/internal/scheduler/scheduler.go is 1,028 lines. DAG walk, retry backoff, gate approval, and event emission all in one file.
items.acceptance_criteria: Extract retry logic to retry.go, gate logic to gate.go, event emission to events.go. scheduler.go under 400 lines. All scheduler tests pass.

items.title: Gateway auth middleware tightly coupled to Cloudflare Access
items.evidence: middleware/auth.go (391 lines) — Cloudflare-specific JWT validation and service token logic mixed with generic auth interface. No abstraction for alternative providers.
items.acceptance_criteria: Extract AuthProvider interface. Implement CloudflareAuthProvider and NoopAuthProvider. Gateway selects provider via config. Tests mock provider.

items.title: Gateway test coverage at ~25% (4/16 Go files)
items.evidence: 4 test files for 16 Go source files. Untested: metrics/, traces/, tracing/ packages, WebSocket hub edge cases.
items.acceptance_criteria: Add tests for: hub client registration/deregistration, stream filtering, trace proxy handler, metrics endpoint. Coverage >50%.

items.title: Redis data store uses emptyDir (ephemeral) in K8s
items.evidence: k8s/redis.yaml uses emptyDir: {} for data volume. Redis data lost on pod restart. Run state and API keys not persisted.
items.acceptance_criteria: Add PVC with storageClass: longhorn for Redis data. Configure Redis appendonly yes. Verify data survives pod restart.

items.title: Large frontend components (7 files >380 lines) resist review and testing
items.evidence: NetworkPanel.tsx (777 lines), MissionControlLayout.tsx (529 lines), LineageOverlay.tsx (430 lines), PolicyOverlay.tsx (409 lines), StreamingCanvas.tsx (392 lines), NodePalette.tsx (387 lines), ConsolePanel.tsx (383 lines).
items.acceptance_criteria: Split each into <250-line sub-components. NetworkPanel: extract AgentStatusCard, MetricsGrid. MissionControlLayout: extract PanelContainer, ToolbarSection.

items.title: MinIO credentials marked optional: true in K8s manifest
items.evidence: k8s/minio.yaml:74-83 — secretKeyRef with optional: true. MinIO starts with blank credentials if secret missing, creating security risk.
items.acceptance_criteria: Remove optional: true from minio-credentials secretKeyRef. Add SealedSecret or SOPS-encrypted secret to repo. MinIO pod fails to start if credentials missing.

items.title: Frontend state management uses legacy re-exports and dual API surface
items.evidence: stores/index.ts:122-129 has legacy re-exports (useCanvasStore as useReactFlowStore). Lines 48-64 maintain dual StreamSession vs LegacyStreamSession API.
items.acceptance_criteria: Remove legacy re-exports. Migrate all consumers to canonical store imports. Remove LegacyStreamSession type and adapter code.

items.title: No circuit breaker for Redis/K8s API calls in orchestrator
items.evidence: Redis operations in runstore/redis.go and K8s API calls in driver/k8s.go have no circuit breaker. Cascading failures possible when backends degrade.
items.acceptance_criteria: Add circuit breaker (e.g., sony/gobreaker) to Redis client and K8s client. Configure open/half-open thresholds. Expose circuit state as Prometheus metric.

items.title: Docker Compose dev config lacks health checks and resource limits
items.evidence: docker-compose.dev.yml has no healthcheck blocks on services, no resource limits. Dev services can consume unlimited resources and fail silently.
items.acceptance_criteria: Add healthcheck to gateway, orchestrator, redis, frontend in docker-compose.dev.yml. Add deploy.resources.limits for dev parity.
